search_query: do i need multiple visual c++ redistributables
combined_text: Q: How many versions of Microsoft Visual C++ do I need? And are they all necessary? P _Phenom asked on November 15, 2012Q: How many versions of Microsoft Visual C++ do I need? And are they all necessary? I recently upgraded to Windows 8 and have since reinstalled several apps I previously had on Windows Vista 64 bit.
